item.title: v0.97.0
item.description: 0.97.0 (2026-04-23) Full Changelog: v0.96.0...v0.97.0 Features api: CMA Memory public beta (fc30ebe) Bug Fixes api: fix errors in api spec (f946de8) api: restore missing features (72212ab) Performance Improvements client: optimize file structure copying in multipart requests (1f9eed3) Chores
